items.title: [Stein & Fischer] The Denver Nuggets have rebuffed trade calls for Cameron Johnson. Peyton Watson is said to be seeking a deal north of $25 million in average annual value.

items.title: The Celtics have reportedly shown trade interest in Cameron Johnson, per Michael Scotto.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
The Celtics have reportedly shown trade interest in Cameron Johnson, per Michael Scotto.

Johnson last season: 12.2 PPG, converted on 43% of his 4.7 3PAs

Johnson is on an expiring $23.06 million contract.

Lots of great intel below from Scotto.
